title: ComputeMappingOutput
description: Schema for the dict returned by modmanager_cli.engine.compute_mapping().

warnings.description: Non-fatal diagnostic messages.  Each string begins with a W_ code.

errors.description: Fatal diagnostic messages.  Each string begins with an E_ code.  When non-empty, final_mapping MUST be empty.

forest.description: File-mapping forest.  Each node is the destination file with its chain of change-requests.  Always present, even when errors exist.

final_mapping.description: Resolved one-to-one file mappings.  Empty when errors is non-empty or any branch is unresolved.

path.description: Absolute path of the source file, or '!' for a delete sentinel.

action_order.description: Runtime-injected action ordering hint. Defaults to 0 when missing or unreliable.

provenance_ref.description: Action-level origin reference. Falls back to '404' when missing or empty.

sidecar_ref.description: Action-level sidecar reference. Falls back to '404' when missing or empty.

mixed_id.description: appid:modid of the mod introducing this change.

hashtype.description: Hash algorithm identifier (e.g. 'sha256').  'invalid' means not yet computed.

hashvalue.description: Hex digest of the source file, or '' / '0' when not yet known.

ForestNode.description: A destination file node in the mapping forest.

path.description: Absolute path of the destination file (key of this forest node).

changerequest.description: Ordered list of candidate change-requests targeting this file.

destin_mixed_id.description: appid:modid of the mod that owns this destination file.  Absent for legacy nodes.

warning.description: Present and set to 'W_FOREST_BRANCHING' when more than one candidate exists.

candidates.description: Source paths of all candidates, in deterministic sort order.  Present only when warning is set.

path.description: Absolute path of the destination file.

request.description: The winning change-request, or null when the target has no source (vacuous node).
